creator: jerome.brilland@aiesec.net
text:
The PS/2 IntelliMouse mouse doesn't work when enabled with sysinstall : No cursor moving.

Dec 28 18:25:49 localhost kernel : psm0 : <PS/2 Mouse> irq 12 on atkbdc0
Dec 28 18:25:49 localhost kernel : psm0 : [GIANT-LOCKED]
Dec 28 18:25:49 localhost kernel : psm0 : [ITHREAD]
Dec 28 18:25:49 localhost kernel : psm0 : model IntelliMouse, device IP3 

The moused daemon is running.

Same problem under FreeBSD i386 BETA4 and RC1, but the mouse works fine under FreeBSD amd64.

How-To-Repeat: Try to enable a PS/2 IntelliMouse mouse with sysinstall.
